task_completion.description: Verify that a new rating criterion named 'Durability' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Rating), a rating criterion named 'Durability' is visible in the list of ratings, or its creation form is being filled out.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Durability' rating is set to be visible in the Default Store View.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Durability' rating edit page, 'Default Store View' is selected in the 'Visibility In' multi-select box.

task_completion.description: Verify that the review for 'Business Laptop Pro' by 'TechBuyer42' is added, approved, and has the correct ratings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A review form for 'Business Laptop Pro' is filled out with Nickname 'TechBuyer42', Status 'Approved', and ratings: Quality 5, Value 4, Price 3, Durability 5. Alternatively, it is visible in the 'All Reviews' grid with status 'Approved'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the review for 'Wireless Headphones' by 'AudioFan' is added, approved, and has the correct ratings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A review form for 'Wireless Headphones' is filled out with Nickname 'AudioFan', Status 'Approved', and ratings: Quality 4, Value 5, Price 4, Durability 3. Alternatively, it is visible in the 'All Reviews' grid with status 'Approved'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the review for 'Yoga Mat Premium' by 'FitnessPro' is added, approved, and has the correct ratings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A review form for 'Yoga Mat Premium' is filled out with Nickname 'FitnessPro', Status 'Approved', and ratings: Quality 5, Value 4, Price 5, Durability 4. Alternatively, it is visible in the 'All Reviews' grid with status 'Approved'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to navigate the Magento Admin panel to create the rating and reviews.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser windows showing Magento Admin interfaces (Stores > Rating, Marketing > All Reviews) being actively used.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly insert the rating or reviews into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show SQL INSERT commands or direct database manipulation scripts for the reviews or ratings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires creating a 'Durability' rating criterion in Magento. Three reviews must be added and approved: 1. Product: LAPTOP-001, Nickname: TechBuyer42, Summary: Excellent build quality, Ratings: Quality=5, Value=4, Price=3, Durability=5. 2. Product: HEADPHONES-001, Nickname: AudioFan, Summary: Great sound, decent comfort, Ratings: Quality=4, Value=5, Price=4, Durability=3. 3. Product: YOGA-001, Nickname: FitnessPro, Summary: Perfect for daily practice, Ratings: Quality=5, Value=4, Price=5, Durability=4.
